data.title: Famous Crypto Influencer Explains Why Shiba Inu Price Is Unlikely To Ever Hit Lofty $1 Mark
data.description:
The prospect of Shiba Inu (SHIB) attaining the highly anticipated $1 mark has captured the imaginations of many in the cryptosphere.
source: https://zycrypto.com/famous-crypto-influencer-explains-why-shiba-inu-price-is-unlikely-to-ever-hit-lofty-1-mark/

data.title: Google Demands MiCA Licensing for Crypto Ads in 30 European Countries
data.description:
Google will require crypto advertisers in Europe to be MiCA- or CASP-licensed and certified by Google starting April 23, 2025.

The post Google Demands MiCA Licensing for Crypto Ads in 30 European Countries first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/14/google-mica-crypto-ads-europe/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=google-mica-crypto-ads-europe

data.title: Musk Predicts AI Advancements in Autonomous Driving
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk has stated that artificial intelligence will soon surpass the best human reasoning capabilities. He also mentioned that a comprehensive and pure general AI solution for fully autonomous driving will soon emerge, relying solely on cameras, Tesla AI chips, and Tesla AI software.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated 21.4437 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 21.4437 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 17.7454 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 3.6984 million US dollars.

data.title: Palantir’s Stock Soars Amidst NATO Contract for AI System
data.description:
NATO's acquisition of an AI system from Palantir marks a pivotal moment in defense technology.
source: https://tokenist.com/palantirs-stock-soars-amidst-nato-contract-for-ai-system/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=palantirs-stock-soars-amidst-nato-contract-for-ai-system

data.title: Mining: Tether directs its hashrate to Ocean
data.description:
Tether expands its bitcoin mining strategy focusing on decentralization with the Ocean mining pool.
source: https://atlas21.com/mining-tether-directs-its-hashrate-to-ocean/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=mining-tether-directs-its-hashrate-to-ocean

data.title: KernelDAO: Tokens are now live and available for airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: KernelDAO published a post on the X platform stating that the KERNEL token is now officially online and open for airdrops. Currently, multiple CEXs have confirmed that KERNEL will be launched, and more trading platforms will join in the future.

data.title: Musk: Soon AI will far surpass the best human beings in reasoning
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk said that soon artificial intelligence will far exceed the best human level in reasoning. He also said that soon there will be a comprehensive, pure general artificial intelligence solution for fully autonomous driving for the first time, which only requires cameras and Tesla AI chips, as well as Tesla AI software. (Jinshi)

data.title: Hong Kong-listed company Hong Kong Asia Holdings increased its holdings of 10 BTC last week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, Hong Kong-listed company Hong Kong Asia Holdings, known as Hong Kong Stock Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), increased its holdings of 10 BTC last week, strengthening the company's asset allocation strategy. It now holds a total of 28.88 BTC.

data.title: Hong Kong Asia Holdings Increases Bitcoin Holdings to 28.88 BTC
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Hong Kong-listed company Hong Asia Holdings, often compared to MicroStrategy, has recently acquired an additional 10 BTC. This move further strengthens the company's asset allocation strategy, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 28.88 BTC.
